Metadata.title: I.C.F. | Governance · Geopolitics · Astropolitics
Metadata.description: Global strategy for an expanding world. Geopolitics, economy, security, and space.

Hero.lead: We analyse global power… across two domains: <gold>Earth and Space</gold>.
Hero.line2: Global strategy for an expanding world

ValuesPillars.label: Pillars
ValuesPillars.title: How we think about power
ValuesPillars.introOpening: We connect global knowledge with local progress:
ValuesPillars.introLine2: Projects that transform realities on Earth and
ValuesPillars.introLine3: explore space as a driver of innovation and adaptation.
ValuesPillars.iconsHint: Hover a card (or focus it with the keyboard) to see each pillar's title and description.

vision.name: Global vision
vision.desc: A read of the international environment and trends that inform decisions on Earth and in space.

strategy.name: Strategy
strategy.desc: Priorities, pathways, and partnerships to reach public, private, or territorial goals with strategic clarity.

development.name: Development
development.desc: Initiatives, capabilities, and delivery to make strategy workable over time with tangible impact.

security.name: Security
security.desc: Risk, rules, and trust in competitive, digital, and regulatory settings that demand rigour.

expansion.name: Expansion
expansion.desc: Growth into new markets and frontiers, integrating the space dimension of power and cooperation.

SplitDomains.introP1: The same phenomena that have defined power on Earth: science, technology, competition, cooperation, security, regulation, policy, and economics — are now shifting into space.
SplitDomains.introP2: The Foundation analyses these processes across both domains to support organisations in their strategic positioning and entry into emerging markets.
SplitDomains.earthBody: Global Governance, Geopolitics and Geoeconomics, Cooperation and Competition in the International System
SplitDomains.earthAlt: Planet Earth at night, city lights and horizon
SplitDomains.spaceBody: We bring space closer to people and organisations so they can be visionaries, pioneers, and active actors in building the new great frontier through the opportunities the space economy offers us.
SplitDomains.spaceAlt: Earth seen through space station windows

EconomyTransition.title: Transition of economic sectors
EconomyTransition.intro: The sectors that sustain the economy on Earth feed the emergent areas of the space economy: data, infrastructure, resources, mobility, human activities, and innovation.
EconomyTransition.imageAlt: Infographic: Earth economy sectors connected to emergent space economy areas around the planet

Nosotros.whoP1: We are the Fundación Consultores Internacionales: more than <years>15 years</years> accompanying public and private organisations, and people, to find their place and become active actors in the world system.
Nosotros.whoP2Lead: Our focus is to facilitate the development of ideas and projects with impact on Earth or in Outer Space.
Nosotros.whoP2Accent1: Research and Innovation applied to projects
Nosotros.carouselHint: Auto-advance every {seconds} s · Pauses on hover
Nosotros.carouselLive: Pair {current} of {total}. The carousel returns to the start after the last pair.

Educacion.title: We train leaders for both domains of power
Educacion.body: Courses, workshops, and academic articles focused on global governance, situational analysis, and astropolitics literacy.

Nexus.title: NEXUS I.C.F.
Nexus.body: A technology platform that integrates artificial intelligence, machine learning, and cloud architectures to process, analyse, and connect strategic information in complex environments —with emphasis on curating and validating sources to reduce uncertainty and strengthen strategic decision-making.
Nexus.footnote: A hub integrating data, specialised knowledge, and cooperation networks — Earth and Space.

FciConnect.title: I.C.F. Connect
FciConnect.intro: A meeting point for networks, content, and contact — structure ready for when you define links and multimedia.

Publications.title: Analysis and strategic intelligence
Publications.intro: Documents for both domains of global power: Earth and Space.
Publications.empty: No featured posts yet. Visit the blog to see all content.
